scripts.clean: find . ! -name '.pnpm-store' -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' \+ && find packages -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' \+ && find packages -name 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo' -type f -exec rm '{}' \+
scripts.clean-ts: find packages -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' \+ && find packages -name 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo' -type f -exec rm '{}' \+
